name: Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
Beat butter for 30 seconds. Add the 1/4 cup sugar and beat until fluffy.
Stir in the 1 cup flour. Press onto bottom of greased 8-inch square pan.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, beat eggs; add remaining 3/4 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons flour,
lemon peel, lemon juice, and baking powder. Beat until slightly thickened.
Pour over baked layer and bake an additional 25-30 minutes or until
light golden brown around the edges. Cool on a wire rack. Sift powdered
sugar over top.
